word: G5171 - τρυφάω - trypháō - troo-fah'-o - Live in pleasure

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τρυφάω

- Transliteration: Truphao

- Phonetic: troo-fah'-o

- Definition:

1. to live delicately, live luxuriously, be given to soft and luxurious life

- Origin: from G5172

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5172; to indulge in luxury: - live in pleasure.
